arts.sum: "We all still have the trust in the gaffer and still have trust in the way he's playing, so tomorrow we want to win the game of course for him, but also for us, also for the club, and also for the fans. It hasn't been a really good season, but it's a big game for us and of course we want to achieve something special this season.

arts.ttl: Europa League Preview | Eintracht Frankfurt vs Tottenham
arts.sum: After Borussia Dortmund and Bayern Munich’s elimination from the Champions League, Eintracht Frankfurt remain the Bundesliga’s sole representative in Europe this season. On Thursday night, they host Tottenham Hotspur at…

arts.ttl: Ange Postecoglou admits he does not know what the future holds if Tottenham are dumped out of the Europa League - but says he could not care less
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW IN FRANKFURT: Postecoglou promised to fight 'tooth and nail' to progress. Spurs are level with Eintracht Frankfurt after the first leg in London.

arts.ttl: Tottenham star may have already played his last game for the club as predicament laid bare
arts.sum: Werner may have indeed already played his last game for Tottenham with very few fixtures left in the 2024/25 season. The attacker does have quite a good record when facing Eintracht Frankfurt having contributed six goals and two assists in 17 games against them during his time in the Bundesliga .

arts.ttl: Micky van de Ven delivers strong Ange Postecoglou response and makes clear injury statement
arts.sum: We all still have the trust in the gaffer and still have trust in the way he's playing, so tomorrow we want to win the game of course for him, but also for us, also for the club, and also for the fans. Van de Ven was up before the media in Frankfurt and was asked plenty of questions, ranging from the future of his manager Ange Postecoglou, his own injury status, whether he minds missing every other game and also what effect he thinks his hamstring problems could have on the rest of his career.

We're at a point where we've got an opportunity to get to a semi-final of major competition, obviously we know the challenges before us, so that's what we're excited about. Ange on if this is a 'chance to salvage the season' and his message to the players...

arts.ttl: Spurs star Micky van de Ven picks side amid major Ange Postecoglou debate
arts.sum: Tottenham have endured an awful season under Ange Postecoglou with injuries having blighted both their and Micky van de Ven seasons albeit the Dutchman has now returned to action

arts.ttl: Tottenham predicted lineup vs Eintracht Frankfurt - Champions League
arts.sum: Tottenham's predicted lineup for the huge second leg of their Europa League quarter-final against Eintracht Frankfurt on Thursday night.

arts.ttl: Spurs' Starting 11 From 2008 When They Last Won a Trophy - Where Are They Now?
arts.sum: The likes of Dimitar Berbatov and Robbie Keane were among the last to win a trophy with Tottenham

arts.ttl: Son Heung-min to miss out on Tottenham record as Ange Postecoglou confirms Europa League injury blow
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur captain Son Heung-min will miss out on breaking a club record set by Harry Kane as Ange Postecoglou confirms a new injury blow.
